subcodes.first_line: O thou who art quickened by the spirit of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. Its contents were of utmost eloquence and testified to deep feelings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زنده بروح ملکوت نامه رسید مضامین در نهایت بلاغت بود و دلیل بر احساسات
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Holy Spirit
